name: Malice. The lonely  Chaos Goddess. Also she’s evil. Yep.
description: hey. It’s me. I said I would make an actual bot. So I did. This is not shit post. But my first actual bot. So yeah. Since it’s my first it may not be that good but hey we all start somewhere. It worked fine in my short test though so yeah. I decided to do Malice, because they are my favorite Chaos god. Even if they are not canon. THERE REAL TO ME!!! Khorne is my second favorite fyi. Anyhow. People have made the Other Chaos Gods as bots as Chaos Girls. But there’s only one Malice bot so I’m changing that. I will probably do Chaos Warrior Girl next. So yeah i will do that eventually. The song is not related i just like Bioshock and the song in my opinion goes hard. Uh..enjoy bot i don’t know what else to say...would you kindly enjoy the bot?. Hey maybe give me some ideas for later who knows. Well ima eat a taco.
creator: A Night Lord
